Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-04-02 06:34 UTC

OP

>FOR SALE: PLYWOOD BOX $837,395.99
>ALL ORIGINAL BLUE SHAG CARPET (1 OF 4300)
>LIMITED EDITION OE LIME GREEN BATHROOM (1 OF 800)
>UPGRADED 150 AMP SERVICE (1 OF 300)
>FRESH COAT OF PAINT '93 (SHERWIN WILLIAMS, NO CHEAP CRAP)
>NO LOW BALLERS I KNOW WHAT I GOT

Early replies (first 3)

62059306
He will sell it to BlackedRock or jeets

62059324
>>62059294
>Nooooo you can't sell at the heckin market price you have to sell it to cheap to meeeee

62059330
>>62059294
is there mold and the stove is a gas flame in 2026 I hope
I want to hear strangers on the street chatting through my walls and windows as if they were inside my living room too.
Maybe have a washing machine+dryer unit still built in from the 90s too!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62059978
I WORKED HARD FOR IT BACK IN MY DAY, I KNOW WHAT ITS WORTH, WORKED HARD TO FIX IT UP!
______________________________________
U.S. ARMY VETERAN | PROUD FATHER OF 3 | GRANDFATHER OF 5
MARRIED 47 YEARS TO MY BEAUTIFUL WIFE CAROL - STILL GOT IT
2ND AMENDMENT ABSOLUTIST | TRUMP 2024 | BUILD THE WALL
FORD DIESEL TRUCK OWNER | LIFETIME NRA MEMBER | HUNTING SINCE AGE 8

"I FOUGHT FOR YOUR FREEDOM SO YOU COULD SAY STUPID THINGS ON THE INTERNET"

IF YOU CAN'T STAND BEHIND OUR TROOPS, FEEL FREE TO STAND IN FRONT OF THEM
LIBERAL TEARS ARE WHAT KEEP MY LAWN GREEN
MOLON LABE | COME AND TAKE IT | DON'T TREAD ON ME

62059983
>>62059294
>lowballs him and makes 10 bot accounts to also lowball him

62060147

62060175

62060180

62060209

_______________
US Army 1968-1969
Fuck commies
Join a Union!
No more foreign wars fuck obamna
I love foreign wars USA USA

62060223

62060227
>>62059294
Most the boomers I've seen selling houses let them go for $150k below market to sell fast

And they still made bank because they bought for less than $20k

62060338
>>62060227
>Most the boomers I've seen selling houses let them go for $150k below market to sell fast
not happening

62060353
>>62060338
They get sold in less than a week. That is why you hardly see them listed. It is the foot dragging house flippers refusing to sell below speculation. Frankly there are too many of those assholes.

62060378
>>62060338
I have a house worth $650k US

I would sell it for $500k because less hassle, faster sale, it needs some work, I paid $75k for it, and $500k is the limit I can take tax-free

62060383
>>62060175 >>62060180

62060390
LISTEN UP SNOWFLAKE!!!!!!!!!! I BUSTED MY BUTT MOWING LAWNS FOR THREE WHOLE SUMMERS TO AFFORD MY DOWN PAYMENT!!!!!!!!!!!!! MAYBE IF YOU SPENT MORE TIME PUSHING A BROOM AND LESS TIME PLAYING NINTENDO YOU WOULD BE A HOMEOWNER BY NOW!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

- BOB

Sent from my Samsung Galaxy smartphone

—————————————————————
STAND WITH ISRAEL
IF YOU DONT LOVE IT LEAVE IT
CHEVY BOY
66 CAMARO SS
26 SILVERADO

62060393
>>62059978

Boomerbook posts like this are S tier because they unironically trigger libs

62060505
>>62060393
kys migat

62060539
>>62059294
If you think plywood is an inferior building material, you never built anything in your life. Chipboard and fiberboard are shit. Plywood is awesome. Even the lower quality construction grade is stronger and more dimensionally stable than solid wood. And the really good stuff - baltic birch plywood - is golden. That's what high end speaker cabinets are made of.

62061210
>>62060383
holy based

62062022
>>62060390

Sent from my iPhone

62062058

-----------------------------------
-----------------------------------
Rick "slick rick" Steven's
USAF reserve 1987-1987
I only carry .45 because they don't make .46
TRUMP 2024
Ill take my corona with lime on the beach he he he

HEY I WAS TOLD TO COME HERE FROM AR15 . COM
I SEE A LOT OF YOU KIDS POSTING A Lot OF PLASTIC BULLSHIT GUNS
ALL YOU Kids NEED TO JUST GET YOUSELF A NICE 19 11. .45 IS THE ONLY CALIBER YOU NEED HE HE HE

62062331
>>62060505

Seems it works lol, lmao

62062368
>>62059294

Very sad

62062373
>>62059330

62064630

62064853

62066136

>90s washer/dryer
These are good things you retard. Cattle like you are the reason landlords can get away with putting in cheap shit appliances like “modern” electric ranges when cooking with fire is far superior

62066234

i hate these obviously touched up pictures that make the street look nice and then you go on street view and it's the literal ghetto

62066786

item.title: >Legitimate quantum threat to BTC from Google >Bitcoin price doesn't move at all That's how you know it's bad. — 34 replies — 31.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Legitimate quantum threat to BTC from Google >Bitcoin price doesn't move at all That's how you know it's bad.

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-04-02 05:42 UTC

OP

>Legitimate quantum threat to BTC from Google
>Bitcoin price doesn't move at all
That's how you know it's bad. It's so bad that coiners are absolutely rejecting the reality of their situation. Literally rocking back and forth and saying everything is fine.

You can see it all over X:
>Well if this was true then everything would be destroyed, not just Bitcoin
>If they hack Bitcoin, it would make it worthless, so therefore nobody would ever hack it
>We'll just fix the protocol and migrate to it, ezpz

Absolute fucking copium lmao. So now they're just pretending everything is fine.

Early replies (first 3)

62064120
>>62064115
shut up!!!

62064602
>>62064115

Quantum computers don't exist.

62064636
>I can factor 21 therefore your coin is worthless

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62064695
>>62064683

Alchemists used to try to make gold.

How did that work out?

62064712
>>62064115
>It's so bad that coiners are absolutely rejecting the reality of their situation. Literally rocking back and forth and saying everything is fine.
Or you're retarded and don't know anything about anything.

62064723
>>62064712
>you're retarded and don't know anything about anything!!

62064741
>>62064723
I'm shorting it because of the right reasons and will go long for the right reasons when the price reaches where I expect a real bounce.
It has nothing to do with quantum clickbait that comes out. Only fools like you think something real is going on there.

62064776
>>62064723
Yeah, you're definitely the smartest big boy crypto investor on the planet
(Or, you're wrong)

62064777
>>62064741
>all bitcoin "investors" behave just like me
you must be new and never seen the absolute waves of retard bitcoin investors overreacting to clickbait news that is 1/100th as consequential as what google announced. the odds of everyone suddenly becoming a cool and collected sophisticated investor and stoicly not reacting is 0.

no, the waves of cryptobro retards are denying reality is what's happening. they haven't suddenly become dispassionate hedge fund managers. they're plugging their ears and hoping the existential threat goes away.
>but I'm not doing that!
good for you, you're marginally less retarded than your peers

62064786
>>62064777
you're a complete dumbass, not worth interacting with. it must be hard to be you or with you.

62064794
>>62064777

> getting spooked over threats that don't exist that have solutions, if the materialize

checked

62064815
>>62064115
>Bottom signal FUD deployed

62064831
>>62064786
>you're not worth interacting with!!!
>(You)
extremely feminine behavior

>>62064794
>i didn't exist during covid and ftx, when retards panic crashed the market
lmao sweet summer child

62064832
>>62064115
I find her very attractive.

62064848
>>62064815
>trading on an opinion on /biz/
bitcoin traders continue to prove their "sophistication"
by all means, let me influence you to buy more

62064858
>>62064831

Did Bitcoin go to zero or did it hit another all time high, almost doubling the previous ath?

62064868
>>62064858
Retards panicked at non-existential-threat news and crashed, while retards are currently not panicking at existential-threat news. But you know that, and you're being willfully dense and pretending not to understand, it's ok.

62064882
>>62064868
>not panicking at existential-threat news
because they know it isn't a threat

62064898
>>62064868

You're the one pretending that everyone is a trader with low time preference who doesn't understand what they're invested in and trying to change the subject.

Everyone isn't a moron who sells their assets every time someone comes up with new fud.

62064913
what a retarded post and retarded strawman.
Bitcoin will adopt sphincs+ based schemes. These are the most conservative post-quantum schemes we have. They are already implemented on the liquid network as shrincs signatures.
The security assumptions of bitcoin will go from sha256 + ecdsa to only sha256.
Meanwhile the shitcoiners (the co-author of the paper works for the ethereum foundation) will need to adopt complex untested schemes to keep their pos consensus layer working.
So yeah, bitcoin has a straightfoward path unlike pos chains. You want these larger signatures to be adopted now when the strongest QC don't even have 100 logical qubits? you're retarded.

62064917
>>62064882
>they know it's not an existential threat
Yeah, that's why they're saying
>If they hack Bitcoin, it would make it worthless, so therefore nobody would ever hack it

Imagine your defense being
>The market can panic faster than the attacker can liquidate

62064924
>>62064917

Do you use google chrome, anon?

62064929
>>62064917
>11 likes
sincerely why are you combing the xeets of literal whos?

62064943
>>62064929
>not enough likes
don't pretend that if i spent 5 more minutes to find one with x10 likes, it would convince you, you weasel

62065107
>>62064913
POS stands for piece of shit for those wondering

62065205
I looked into this a year ago. BTC devs were already hundreds of messages deep into debating which encryption upgrade to use. Many of these were already being coded. It’ll be fine unless someone drops a zero-day quantum computer ten years ahead of schedule.

62065298
>>62064929
why are you in every thread policing xitter likes? twerp

62065340
>google makes the first quantum computer
>they're the only ones who have it
>the only quantum computer on Earth
>they randomly decide to use it to attack Bitcoin of all fucking things
quantum FUD is for retarded brainlets only

62065485
>>62064777
...
Are you black?

62066130
>>62064115
Worst case scenario is a hard fork to quantum proof algo.
Most likely scenario is that quantum stays a pipe dream that keeps being "two decades away" forever like thorium reactors.

62066268
>>62066130
You can't migrate Satoshi's P2PK transactions. Any solution to this causes a huge rift in the community. You either hard code a blacklist of a bunch of old wallets that you HOPE are all Satoshi's, but this establishes a bad precedent, or you let Satoshi's funds be stolen and dilute the fuck out of the supply, crashing the price.

62066736
>>62066268
Just slurp the Satoshi sats when that happens
Easy peasy

62066768
>>62064741
>quantum clickbait
What are you saying, the tech isn’t real?

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 231 replies — 42.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 231 • Updated: 2026-04-02 01:18 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62048708
>>62045475
You mean there are none?
>>62048431
Obamaleaf was worse

62048850
>>62048431
>You mean there are none?
What would you regard as "influential news"?

62048939
>>62048850
What do you think? Can you define influential

62048959
>>62048939
>Can you define influential
No, because it's a subjective word. To some people a towns hall meting of a town of 500 people might be the most "influential" thing in the world since it affect them, their home town and their lives. To someone else it's a completely irrelevant event because it doesn't affect anyone or anything in their own lives. To some people the war in Iran is completely unimportant and doesn't affect them. To some people, like the Iranians is a life changing event.

The word "influential" news is in the perception of the beholder. I can give you as much stuff as you want, it's just... If you don't care about it then it's not "influental", that's why I'm asking
>What would you regard as "influential news"?
Since every individual themselves need to determine what THEY think is influential for them and tickles their funny bone.

62049007
>>62048939
Here, a google definiton; Influential describes
someone or something with the power to cause change, shape decisions, or exert significant impact on people or events. It implies having high status, authority, or being highly important (e.g., an influential leader or book).

62049042
>>62048939
>>62045442
>>62048708
If you can't even define what you want then how can I even give it to you, right? I can only give you something you can actually define.

62049654
>>62048959
>>62049007
>>62049042

You literally shill this fucking coin. Do some influencing

62051513
>>62049654
Yes. Define "influencing". What would INFLUENCE YOU? Naked ladies? Hackatons? Drugs? New technical developments? What influences YOU? If I just post something then you'll be like "No, that's not good enough", so what's the actual point if I can't give you EXACTLY what you want?

62051763
>>62051513
From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight, nope an idiot

62051818
>>62051763
>From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight
You tell me what you think is an "intellectual insight"? What would convince you? Throwing a hissy fit and getting emotional at me doesn't really work...

62052015
>>62051763
I'm not sure if I'm making myself clear enough. Define what you think would constitute for something that YOU consider an "intellectual insight" in your own mind? Can you post a piece of information from another chain that amazed you, that made you think, that made you say "Oh shit, this is lit"? I hope I've made myself clear enough good sar.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056424
>>62051763
100$ end of bull run. Here, some influencing for you.


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056570
>>62051763
>>62049654
>>62048939
>>62048708
>>62045442
Here you go. Let me influence you young Vishnus of the mindchain; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU
DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).

62056612
>>62056570
>DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).
This is JUST one of the possible applications. Of course you'll be able to execute ANY arbitrary operation on-chain, like any Web2 cloud can. Imagine a WHOLE GAME deployed on-chain. Literally every step of your character, every emote, every chat message, every loot drop and pick up being on-chain. You'll of course also be able to run AI agents and shit like that... DOT is the ONLY chain capable of doing MILLIONS of TPS once NOMT + JAM get implemented
NOMT alone will x10 the throughput of the whole DOT chain. https://www.rob.tech/blog/introducing-nomt/ and https://github.com/thrumdev/nomt and https://www.reddit.com/r/Polkadot/comments/1nzjhuq/what_has_happened_to_nomt/ and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N3BX2eTqpro

So what's getting shipped this year that's considered "influential" for out young Vishnus of the mindchain? JAM, NOMT, the Polkadot App and more stuff (instant unstaking (unstaking will go from 28 days do 1-2 days)), project individuality (proof of personhood that doesn't require KYC, 500ms block (Basti blocks), and more)

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056623
How do I buy this shit and how long do I hold

62056631
When will you incels realize shitcoins only go up if bitcoin goes up, it doesn’t matter how much ‘bullish’ news a shitcoin gets

62056642
>>62056623
What do you mean "How do I buy this shit"? Bro, if this comes of as mean, it's not meant as mean and I'm sorry if it sounds mean. If you can't figure out how to buy something yourself then please just don't buy it at all. Make yourself a favor

>>62056631
You do realize that this won't be true forever? And that certain projects do decouple from BTC when they're ripe for it.

62056686
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU

Oliver makes a really good point here where he tries to point out that like 4 years ago L2s could just exist and people would use them and NOW people are demanding that the L2s upgrade and improve in order to still be considered useful. At this point I would like to add an additional thing. The thing that people want from major L2s (like Arbitrum and AVAX and other stuff like that) is what DOT L2s already have. The major L2s can't compete with DOT because they're behind and once JAM hits they'll be even more behind. In the time DOT gets JAM the L2s won't even have what DOT has RIGHT NOW. DOT has shared security, it has built-in native SAFE bridging (that's not even a bridge, it's a XCM, it uses HRMP channels), because of the shared security it DOES NOT fragment liquidity, you can use the functionality of ANOTHER chain on DOT (so of other DOT chains and other chains in general that aren't on DOT). Once people realize that they can EASILY build on DOT while every other chains LIMITS them in some shape or form they'll start flocking to DOT. Every other chain has a ton of problems that DOT simply DOES NOT therefore DOT is technologically speaking superior. Sooner or later the developers will catch onto it and start developing on DOT since the other chains have limited capabilities. You can only develop humdrum applications on ETH, no innovation will ever come out of ETH ever again. ETH is obselete and unreconcilable. Sure it'll stay relevant for a few more year but how much longer can it stand the test of time? BTC is windows 1.0, ETH is windows 98, DOT is Windows 12 lol (Yes, not Windows 11, it's windows 12).

62056998
>>62056631
The game is changing. This bear market will prove it

62057110
>>62056998
>The game is changing.
What do you see anon? Help us understand what you see when you say "The game is changing". And yes, I do agree that stuff will shift from stupidity back to usability. So, meme coins were the LAST DROP. Enough is ENOUGH. We need to go back to our roots and invest into stuff that actually makes sense and is GROUND BREAKING. If we don't pivot in this liminal time then the industry as a whole will be finished for like 10-20 years UNTIL we pivot there is no way forward. We need to REALIZE that BTC is crap, ETH is crap, SOL is crap, USDT is centralized shit, XRP is useless, TRX is a cult run piece of shit, lol BCH is in the top 10 WTF, DOGE is crap, BNB is fucking crap. It's all just useless junk. Literally the whole of top 10 is fucking garbage that's unusable. It's literally all Windows 1 and Windows 98 type of coins while we already have the Vishnu of the mindchain, the Windows 12 of blockchains, the collectibe 1/9 Lamborghini Veneno Roadster of the blockchain, the fucking Rolls-Royce of the blockchain industry, and we're still stuck with the fucking Windows 1 and Windows 98 of the blockchain industry. Guys, it's time for FUCKING CHANGE. Either we pivot to the 3rd generation blockchains or the whole sector will GO UNDER for a decade or two. Do you want to suck cock for 10 to 20 years? Or do you just market sell your garbage gen 1 and gen 2 tokens/coins and move on with your life and buy the actual technical innovation? It's choice time and it's GOOD to know that any day you can change your whole fucking life. If you want the world to change then the first step to changing the world is to CHANGE YOUR FUCKING SELF. You only need to 1. WANT THE CHANGE and 2. BELIEVE YOU CAN CHANGE (Self-efficacy). Those are the 2 most important principles of BEHAVIOURAL CHANGE. Change your behaviour and with that you'll change the world. Sure it'll take time and effort but hey, even wallowing in your misery, being depressed takes time and effort.

62058962
>>62056631
Algorand is pumping while Bitcoin is dumping because it is quantum secure. Nigger

62059225
DOT will reach the $1.60 range before this week ends

62059268
>>62057110
See was that so hard on being influential?

62060540
>>62059268
The thing is, that "influenced" you... Doesn't mean it influenced the other people. Everyone is a unique little program and therefore needs unique inputs in order to produce the desired output. One man's trash is another man's treasure

>>62058962
Nagger

62060621
100$ end of the FUCKING bull run. Here's some influential and intellectual insights

62060648
>>62060540
How do you know. Besides the intent of you making this thread was to educate/shill/ influence the mass retards on this site, don't try to convince me otherwise

62062169
>>62060648
>How do you know.
What do you mean by that? How do I know what?

62062500
>>62060648
How I know that people are unique little programs and that I need to input unique inputs to get the desired outputs? Is that what you're asking or?

62062550
Let me "influence" you young Vishnus of the MINDchain. Listen to one of our spiritual leaders Oliver Talé-Yaźdi how he talks about the Vishnu mindchain. Join our cult *kmh* *kmh* web3 organization where we talk about the new world order.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2039256751346700502

62065568
100$ end of MIND RUN

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62015997

62016663
>>62015997
>yIkEs

62016952

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038406

62040244

62041180

Didn’t that one jew they love, Ari Juels, write a book on their dime? So there was a book published, just a piece of fiction.

62043950
hate em all hate em alllll :}

62044829
s :}

62045138
say it stinkies. say "i deserve nothing but the 4 curses that befall all stinkies: pain, misery, humiliation, and incel rage/cuckoldry" XD

62045180

62046271
>>62045180
i think... i think he. actually. believes this xD

62047318

you're a retarded cuckold

62048655

62050929

62050936
>>62045180
That'd be the end. But until then: 

62051982


62054375
fuck em all so much
hate em all think they're dumb so gay too
hate all stinks
fuckin cringe ass niggas

62054396
>>62054375

62054429
>>62015802
I remember the Summer of Dreams like it was yesterday.

62054451
>>62054429
>The world was at my fingertips!
>Waking up every day feeling high and mighty
We got too cocky linkmarines! HAHHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAA

62054546
>>62045180
bro , link didnt even break ath this cycle. there is no hope for link. cant even ride up with bitcin, founders atill dump millions. ita only going to go lower.

not even trying to fud. no clarity act wont increase hype. and no banks are not trying to surpress price.

there is no hype and no demand. no community ,

62054560

62054650
>>62015802
I admire your dedication OP. The amount of eternally poor linkfag seethe that you have generated is more than all the twitter fudders put together. Respect.

62054880
>>62054560

item.title: What the fuck is going on with MSFT? How is this not a great entry? Convince me to not go all in by monday. — 82 replies — 19.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
What the fuck is going on with MSFT? How is this not a great entry? Convince me to not go all in by monday.

Open thread • Replies: 82 • Updated: 2026-04-02 02:34 UTC

OP

What the fuck is going on with MSFT?
How is this not a great entry?
Convince me to not go all in by monday.

Early replies (first 3)

62043952
because the music has stopped

fucking cretin

62043962
Just buy gold and gold mining stocks.

62043971
>>62043947
I would wait until i see signs of of absolute panic.
And even then only go in for a medium term trade.
Liquidity is not great and there are big IPOs coming that will absorb even more of it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62050883
>>62043947
Hey, I work at Microsoft as a Senior Data Center Technician. It's an absolute mess. We're have soooo many data centers going up, including an OpenAI project, but with the cracks clearly showing in OpenAI's profitability, as well as Sora getting shut down, there is a lot of tension in the air. We just got a hiring freeze nationwide, if I'm not mistaken. Our network engineers are all outsourced to India. We do not have an on-site NOC at any of our facilities, as far as I'm aware. These street shitter network engineers are completely incompetent and projects drag because of them. In addition, dIvERsiTy iZ oUr StrEngt here, so a lot of new techs we hire are incompetent brown/black trash. One manager just hired his son. I'm probably going to be quitting the data center world once this bubble pops, which is most likely this year.

62051391
>>62043947
Because when you go all in on AI, you lose. Shrimple as.

62051399
Great entry for a short

62051403
>>62050633
No one went broke betting on the turkey before thanksgiving

62051497
>>62043947
the company is jeeted to a point where you have to wonder if they can ever get back from that

62051499
Biz as always, low IQ people blaming everything on indians. Like if MICROSOFT hasn't been shit forever. But now, it's all indians fault. Sure buddies. Fucking retards

62051760
>>62049635
>>62049655
You're burying the lead. The level of goodwill they lost from the Xbone cannot be understated. They were saying insane shit like the kinect would be able to count how many people were in your living room watching a movie, and the rental price would dynamically change to accommodate it. And you wouldnt even be able to lend your game discs out, theyd be hard linked to your console.

Only for Sony to hit the stage at the next E3 and announce a "dynamic" new way to lend your game to friends. Only for one exec to walk up, then cheekily hand his ps4 disc to another exec. And some shit about all processing being handled in "the cloud", which gamers immediately saw through as Oh we wont really own our games theyll be on Microshit's servers forever. It was a fucking debacle all around. Even the price, Xbone was $499, PS4 was $399.

62051770
”we support bipoc trans gamers” - minecraft title screen after jeetsoft acquisition

62051787
>>62043947
In those 3 peaks I see
>exuberance
>metered enthusiasm that is beginning to wane
>desperation
where we are now, it might try to rechallenge the previous high, but it will fall short and then we'll start to see the 'exposé' articles hit the news after it starts plummeting
I have no position in ms, just how I see it going down

62051789
>>62051499

>Microsoft was always a mixed bag
>now there are Indians on top of that

how does this not make sense to you

62051794
The company is failing because it is too jeeted. The cheap labor pumped up the stock to astronomically high levels. But now the effects of that are lowering the value of the company product. So the sock has to go down as investors look to alternatives for better products.

62051822
>>62051497
Usually when the rot (Indians or other nepo groups) gets past a certain points its just irreversibly fucked.
Not a collaspe by any means but just slowly fading into irrelevance and incompetence like the legacy tech companies (IBM, HPE, whatever)

62051849
>>62051822

IBM is the best example. It was huge. America's first premier tech company. It should still be so. But nope. They were the first to take the mass Indianification poison pill, greedy execs looking for cheaper workers, until it backfired and the Indian clan had enough collective power to take it over entirely. Now it's just an eternally irrelevant dinosaur and they squat on the embers collecting whatever spare pennies they can off of it.

62051889
>>62051499
msft was garbage first, but they improved and XP and later Win7 were kinda ok, but then sudenly they started implementing jeets and everything went to shit

62051895
>>62043947
MacroHard gonna pummel Microjeet like a Pajeeta girl on her first night off the plane in Texas getting pounded by big white cock.

62052017
>>62049474
and it still isn’t worth it to use

62052128
>>62043947

It’s because they attached themselves to the hip to openAI. Same as oracle, market knows Altman is a scammer

62053062
>>62048780
Azure is also trash, even open AI is trying to switch to AWS and they opened a law suit against them.

62053066
>>62049594
>They deserve to die for what they did to Halo
This.

62054681
>>62050175

62054695
>>62043947

62054705
>>62047799

Good times

62054994
>>62051399

62056532
>>62054695

And everyone hates America now.
Many are moving away from Microjeet and Azure.

62061658
>>62047766
DIS NIGGA USIN ICT LMAO
DOW Theory for zoomers

62061676
>>62043947
>since this post 4 days ago, it has began a head-n-shoulders off support at 350
Good luck believers.

62063135
>>62049970
there's an indicator that does that automatically

62066090
I am on Win11, and I recently renamed my headphones through the Settings app. That's it, just renamed them. Windows for some reason disabled them entirely, and I had to manually reenable them by digging through 5 menus to find the right setting. It's beyond garbage, I'm only using Windows because of gaming, but Steam runs on Linux too, so even there MS is losing its edge.

62066117
This is the century of Linux

62066120
>>62043947
they went all in on AI and AI price is gonna skyrocket, they're fucked

item.title: Sorry incels, but women are better investors — 28 replies — 8.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Sorry incels, but women are better investors

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-04-02 03:35 UTC

OP

New research confirms a superior performance by female traders

Women have had a pretty bad reputation in global financial markets. As investors, the perception is that they joined the game too late, they saved too little and they invested too conservatively.

But a growing number of surveys and research papers suggest this is a stereotype that is out of date. The reality is that women actually spend more time researching their options than men, are better at matching their investments to their life goals, tend to trade less and when they do, remain calmer during the storms that unnerve male investors on the financial high seas.

So, recent publicity around an NAB report suggesting that women are losing large sums of money because they are too conservative in their investment choices, has raised hackles. Not least because it claims there are anatomical differences in the brains of men and women that influence investment decisions.

One of the most in-depth pieces of research to support the view that women make better investors has come from UNSW Business School

The road the academics travelled was a long one, encompassing a 17-year period, and focused on Finland due to the transparency of its financial marketplace.

The study matched daily trade by male and female individual investors in Nokia and 27 other major Finnish stocks and found that there was a continuous female compounded rate of return of 21.44% per annum, rising to 43.16% per annum just for the main stock, Nokia.

Women individual investors also outperformed domestic and international institutional investors with an even more substantial gain of €1,654.24 million.

Early replies (first 3)

62064583
Women are good bear indicators

62064621
Did you seriously write that crap as bait? Stopped reading after Sorry incels

62064660
>>62064621
OP did a good job
>>62064576
You did a good job. I read ALL that. I notice women tend to be a lot of important economic research and professors. Perhaps their holistic way of think is advantaged.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62064674
No OP is an idiot that put the signal that it is cheap ass bait at the start and reduced anybody reading beyond his signal to the corpus of his bait.

62064791
>>62064576
We are imaginary digital funny money collectors, wrong board!

62064800
>>62064621
here is the pic u wanted to post:

62064827
>>62064576
Cathie Wood. Enough said.

62065075
This is old as fuck but honestly I see it now. The less risk you take the more likely you are to actually make money. Dudes are more likely to think they're some kind of wizz kid genius and make retarded bets that go to zero over the long run, even if it occasionally works out. Women just do what everyone else is doing and make money with the broader market

62065079
>>62064576
My mother is a good investor

62065085
>>62065079
My mom is a good investor too :)

62065104
>>62065075
Men are BOTH more skilled drivers AND more likely to get into an accident.

62065219
>>62064576
Western women aren't good at anything except taking black dick and complaining for gibs.

This article is complete nonsense.

62065308
I'm calling bullshit. 99.9% of women do not have the temperament for trading.

62065313
>>62065308
Investing, not trading

62065314
Are women aware that I don't give a fuck what they do with their 401k.
>17 year period
So I guess from 2000-2017 women invested in blue chips or some shit while men gambled on Swiggity Niggity corp and other tech and housing shit, but since women were less likely to blow up their accounts trying to GET BIG OR DIE they're 'better investors'.

Well good for them, but it's not relevant to me.

62065320
>>62065075
If I had taken risks in 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024 etc. on risky shots like Nvidia instead of listenign to 'broad market thesis' I would have 100xed. Instead I get to listen to idiots tell me simultaneously that women are better investrs because no risks and 'hurr durr but you didn't put all your money in nvidia calls did you genius?" because people are unable to admit that taking a calculated but crazy risk is usually the correct answer unless you want to be Wagebert for the rest of your life.

62065328
>>62065313
>investing
lmfao, that means in the current environment of an inverted demographic pyramid being a greater fool that holds bags that have no bid and are contractually going to have to be sold by pension funds to cover the contractual pay outs to retirees that outnumber active population 2:1.

Lets make a quick calculation:
When 2 Boomers need to have 3000 dollars in shares sold to cover their pay outs and 0 dollar enter the ponzi, how long does it take for the foids 401k to go to 0

62065347
>>62065075
Exactly. Thats why they tell people to just DCA into ETFs. No male or female traders needed.

62065411
>>62065328
tl;dr I lost all my money in memecoins while stacy gets rich

62065440
>>62064576
>finland

62065468
>>62065411
stacy isnt rich. Stacy was stupid enough to pay all her subsidized cash flow into a 401k she has no access too while the pension fund that manages the account has obligations to provide a monthly pay out to Boomer Joes that outnumber stacys contribution not just 2:1 but more like 25:1

62065472
>>62065320
>buying nvidia
>taking risk
nigger you would have bought some fly by night penny stock because it was shilled on wall street bets and lost all your money. Anyone with money in the s&p had exposure to nvidia and outperformed your sorry ass

62065552
>>62065468
>not like me that YOLO'd that money into memecoins

62065577
>>62065552
Are you projecting? My currently preferred method of cashflow is a bit more hand on, beside betting on stacy and her trust in the ponzi schemes of the 20th century going belly up. I will likely keep on doing both, robbing people is actually quite fun.

62065817
Why are moids so bad at everything, sisters?

62065837
>>62065817
>t.50 year old grey haired freak larping as woman

62066208
Lol at the malding moid itt

62066337
>>62064576
looks like another fine study by Yas Kween University

item.title: Should I buy more BTC or altcoins? — 18 replies — 7.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-04-02 04:30 UTC

OP

BTC is steady and battle-tested. Altcoins can go up more but are riskier.

>You buying more BTC like Saylor does or alts like ETH and SOL this cycle?

Early replies (first 3)

62059768
I'm going all in on SOL

62059809
>>62059007

62061375
>>62059768

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62061595
>>62061375
It's shit. Full of memecoins

62061647
>>62059809
Nobody knows that bobo

62061683
>>62059007
>eth is better than btc

62061733
Who's saylor? Gay??

62061834
I have to make it. I need a fucking 10x. But I would like to get another 20x (I found a 20x last year and the year before but failed to make it because too little cash to start with). I am grabbing cash from every single source I can if I have 150-200k I can make it with a 6x and a 10x becomes overkill I WILL MAKE IT

Also EdgeX, which is like Hype, launched yesterday so I'm going to put some cash into that.

62062792
>>62059809
How do you do that?

62065078
>>62061595
But memecoins are also fun depends on your risk tolerance

62065091
>>62059007
BTC is tried and true, it well at least 2, maybe 3x in the nearish future.
Most alts will also 2 or 3x... but some will 5-10x, some even beyond.
If I already had a ton of money I'd just park it in bitcoin for the practical guarantee. I don't, though, so alts it is. Much profit to be rolled back into bitcoin, of course.

62065610
>>62059007
MSTR multiplies well, i made 80% off it last run on 80k ish after taxes didnt catch the bottom tho

62065656
Saylor really needs to be shaken out if bitcoin is to go up further.
>hey, so here's this really cool money that is separated from the state, you can send it anywhere in the world almost instantaneously with no fees and no middleman, and it's finite so it works as digital gold
>the only catch is that some dot com washout now owns 5 percent of the total supply and uses AI-generated videos to lure people into his scammy stocks that offer 11 percent returns
Like who the fuck would want in on this?
>t. 0.33 bitcoin bagholder

62066317
>>62061647
Then dyor

62066485
>>62065091
Btc x10 soon . patience

62066497
>>62065078
Tell me which memecoins to buy. Gimme the next bonk

62066537
>>62066485
Looks like it’s more than that desu. Native BTC staking on Babylon just makes sense if you’re holding. Better than letting it sit there doing nothing. That’s what I’m doing rn.

62066543
>>62061683

item.title: RAM scalper hate thread — 13 replies — 6.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
RAM scalper hate thread

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-04-02 04:40 UTC

OP

> RAM Prices Collapse After AI-Driven Surge, Causing Micron Technology Stock Decline
> RAM prices have sharply declined following an AI-driven surge that prompted Micron Technology to exit the consumer RAM business based on unfulfilled AI commitments from OpenAI's Sam Altman. This shift led to supply shortages and elevated DDR5 prices, but now results in a market correction. Micron's stock dropped from $471 to around $332 amid the price collapse.

To the RAM scalpers out there - why didn't you buy PMs or BTC instead?

Early replies (first 3)

62057141
The price of ram has nothing to do with the stock ponzi valuation of ram producers

62057652
out of the hundreds of ram sticks that i've had, CORSAIR is the only fucking manufacturer that had dead sticks. either DOA or dying after years of use and probably glitchy all along. fuck corsair and fuck niggers who buy anything other than 32GB or higher sticks like that shit in op's pic

62058083
>>62057652
I don't really keep up with the market anymore, I had 2 8GB corsair sticks from a set left over from half a decade ago and needed more RAM, so now there are 4 of them and they are all hitting 3600. Very happy.

I don't know what brands are good anymore. Checked current prices, scary. I remember when RAM was like $50 or something.

You are supposed to get 2 sticks of 32GB for 65GB using the dual-channel shit, ideally, right?

I don't really understand. I also don't see how modern games ran when I had 16GB total, I remember needing 64 for shit.

Much confuse, wow, I don't know what's going on anymore.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62058108
>>62057124
>RAM scalpers
Scalpers aren't a real thing, only companies selling things lower than their real market price and scalpers coming in to even things

62058331
>>62058083
32GB was the bare minimum like 10 years ago if you did anything at all meaningful on a pc

62058649
>>62058331
This is blatantly false. I don't know if RAM got faster or what, but you can run Witcher 3 / Cyberpunk 2077 on max settings with 16GB.

You can also run a shitton of Docker containers with 32GB. Not even sure when you would need 64GB today, since AI would still be on GPU.

Guessing GPU and SSD take a lot these days. I do feel like I used to need 64, blew my mind to realize my PC had 16 before I put the two additional corsairs in.

62058671
>>62058108
t. scalper

62058701
16 worked just fine until I played Rust, which crashed OOM, so I went to 32 and haven't had a problem since. Just wanted to remind everyone that it's this weird looking dude who made the memory prices spike when he bought a year and a half of the entire world's memory chip production for his data centers, which he needs to build to ask the AI how to pay the money back.

62058841
>>62057124
It has little to do with DDR5 price because the big three dont even make them anymore, they are all racing to cash in on HBM4
Market was reacting to the new google AI algo that supposedly reduce HBM4 usage

62060377
>>62058108
How much did you lose?

62065193
>>62058701
>he bought a year and a half of the entire world's memory chip production
He didn't even buy them, he wrote a letter of intent, no transaction happened.
No RAM was physically sold, the consumers bought way less RAM at this high price, there's tons of RAM waiting in stockpiles and now they have no sales, no income, no cashflow.

62066546
>>62058701
>this weird looking dude
I think you mean Jew, he looks like a Jew, because he is one.

62066580
>>62057124
one last scamwick before ram gets replaced entirely with cache

62058906
>>62058785
>Dude! Just take the type of housing that has been a byword for being a FAILURE for nearly a century!
How compelling.

62059140
>>62058785
Now show the median price before covid and the great BRRRR

62059191
>>62058785
a mobile home for near 150k??!!

62059248
>>62058785
Make sure you own the land its on. There are a lot of companies going around jacking the rents up.

62059273
I live around Tampa (Pinellas county) and they are literally demolishing all the mobile home parks to build these copy paste apartment buildings.
Apparently they say mobile homes don't hold up well in hurricane season! (theyve been standing for 50 years no problem though, pay that no mind)

The real explanation is Florida is changing thanks to all the new yorkers etc moving in. The old folks retirement mobile home snowbird community is from a bygone era

62059302
>>62058804
So is lot rent, Trailer Trash.

62059374
You don't own the land for starters and ask grok about what your insurance payment is for a mobile home in Tampa.

62059394
>>62058785
Affordable home prices are essential for the society to be healthy and thriving. What's happening now is a sign of the collapse.

62059398
>>62058804
Property tax is due, hoomer.

62059418
>>62058785
The problem is land, specifically the cost of local infrastructure rather than housing itself. I can easily find used mobile homes ready for transport at 1-5k from the 1980's and 1990's. The costly problem is where to put them. If you think trailer parks are a safe option, your (mostly) wrong. The parks lease out space now for between $400-$1000 per month. You in the end you still pay rent and utilities. The only way to win is to own the land your house sits on. The truth is, you kind find cheap lots without any infrastructure at all. Like in forests and deserts. The problem becomes keeping your city infrastructure and your house close enough to be livable. It's possible to buy a shed and place it in the middle of nowhere to make a "1 room cabin" however to get clean water, food and power out that far on a budget is a nightmare. You'd pay more upfront going off grid than you would if you lived in the dead center of your town.

>>62059191
Depends on location and scale, I've seen 2000's 3 bed 2 bath splits in a retirement community go for about that much.

>>62058906
If you own the land, then you can save your rent or mortgage payment while you live in the FAILURE HOUSE to build a shiny new one without giving the bank squat. When your done you can sell it to old folks who want to downsize or rent it out. It's a stepping
stone to your dream house, not the final destination.

>>62059374
>What about insurance? Or refinancing options?
If your asset doesn't have a high value, why spend the money to ensure it? I understand you might want to ensure a large purchase, but you'd want to ensure what's inside your home, rather than the home itself. I'd suggest Agreed Value Coverage for assets like art, antiques, and memorabilia. Then put the rest into tangible goods that don't spoil like metals and jewels.

62059448
>>62058785
>lot rent
>55+ community

62059473
>>62058906
>you can't live below your means and live in a trailer because normies will think you're a failure
You deserve to be a debtslave

62059746
>>62058785
Lot fees on mobile homes are insane. I looked at one as a joke and it was $60k for a sad double wide and lot fees were $1200 a month, which is like 2x to 4x more than the HOA fees for a nice condo. Absurd.

62059774
>>62058785
the THING with trailers is that you may own the trailer itself but you still have to PAY RENT cause you dont own the lot, AKA fuck this scam

62059823
>>62059418
Except now with solar panels and Starlink, and a cistern you can pretty much go offgrid.

62059844
Retired at 25.

62059939
>>62059823
Let's cover all three:
For the sake of argument, lets use the OP's pic:
a 1979 Skyline Buddy 14' X 64'

Buying the house itself is simple. I found one going for 5k. Lets assume you do the pick up and transport to save 1-3k depending on distance to the final location.

If you plugged into the grid in a rural, low population area (which would have better cost to value) it generally ranges from $133 to over $287 monthly after you put in the hookups. This comes with a massive up front cost for most properties (in the range of 50-100k). Residential trash service typically costs between $20 and $80 per month. Residential internet costs $35 per month.

Now lets go off grid:
Start with electricity
200-amp service is highly recommended to accommodate modern amenities like central air conditioning, electric clothes dryers, or electric water heaters without overloading the whole system. A 200-amp service upgrade for solar, including a new panel, breaker work, and a battery installation, typically costs between $10,000 and $20,000+

Starlink costs typically involves a one-time $349 - $599 hardware fee for the dish and router. With the added cost of $120/mo (400+ Mbps) for internet.

Water's next:
Above-Ground Cisterns can cost up to and surpass $10,000, however you also need to setup your own filtration system. Complete, pre-packaged, whole-house kits often range from $2,500 to over $3,000.

Then comes the wastewater septic tank, which tact's on another total installation ranging from $3,600 to over $12,000.

Next is mail, if you done have a postage address (i.e your land lies outside of a residential district) then you need to buy a P.O. Box at a nearby post office which adds between between $5 and $30 per month.

Next is trash, which when you stare down the barrel is a nightmare. You have to be your own trash man, which means sorting, burning and shipping out your metals papers and plastics.

Overall off grid ends up being 45k before labor and $170 per month.

62059948
>>62059939
Also note job availability.
If there is no work in the woods, it's harder to justify the lifestyle. With how much more companies are replacing online workers with offshore ones or automating them completely it's becoming a harder and harder dream to fulfill and keep. If you already have a stable job in a populated area it may be more feasible to find an empty lot near it than to completely unplug from the world and retreat into the internet.

62059952
>>62059774
>don't own a house: pay rent to live in a house
>own a mobile house: pay lot rent to live in a house
>"own" a house: pay property tax rent to live in a house
there is no way to own a house in the US, you will ALWAYS pay rent

62060002
>>62058785
other houses usually increase in value. mobile homes always lose value.

62060344
>>62058785
$150k for a mobile home..

62060370
>>62059952
3 bed 2 bath
house
$2,600+ per month

mobile home lot rent
$1,200+ per month

mortgage home payment
$2,500+ per month

own land and house
$180 per month

Uh, the winners clear

62060579
>>62060370
You can get a welfare phone for free and sleep under the highway offramp near the skatepark for $0 and all you have to do is blow a couple of homeless dudes to protect you.

62060622
>>62059273
>new yorkers

62060640
>>62058785
141K to live in the methnostate? Not including the cost of land, cost to move your “mansion on wheels”, and cost to hook up utilities and plumbing.

62060915
>>62058785
Mobile shit boxes down 5%, cost of living up 20%

62061004
>>62058785
Pad rent fucks any financial utility of these things into the fucking ground (that you're renting). Fucking useless.

62061119
>>62058794
This. Buy land, not the home. Boomers fell for the home is your greatest investment(sorry kids) meme. The land can provide

62061134
>>62058785
Private equity and similar own all the lots mobile homes are on and raise the rates to whatever they want. It takes like $100-300k those poorfags don't have to move one of those homes and you can't plunk it anywhere you want, so it's a great way to get ultracucked.

62065278
>>62058785
rent on the lot in the trailer park approaches what the apartment would cost plus mortgage on top of that.
t. white trash

item.title: 6 FIG HELL — 37 replies — 4.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
6 FIG HELL

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-04-01 22:02 UTC

OP

HOW DO I PUSH IT TO 7 FIGS AAAAAAAAAARHHHHHHHHHH

Early replies (first 3)

62062096
>>62062044

Wait.

62062307
>>62062044
Buy accounts into prop firms until you get accepted. Learn orderflow and put all the gains on bitcoin or international stocks. You have a lot of money to lose trying to pass the prop firm test, you should be okay anon.

62062320
>>62062044
Only 2.5% of Americans have 1M.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62062406
>>62062379
That’s how poor majority of people and Americans are.
Remember, the majority of the internet are people like this.

62062413
>>62062341
i was a millionaire until I got Trump'd.

62062417
>>62062413
Then you were still poor.
Get a professional wealth manager.

62062452
you just need to make more money, there's no other recourse

investing is a meme currently. expect 5-7% returns annually over the next decade. there will be no 10-15% from the insane bull market we just had unless you're willing to play with leveraged assets

62062482
>>62062406
25% is a lot. How tf they survive if something happens? If they crash the car they are done?

62062548
>>62062482
They live paycheck to paycheck

62062570
>>62062320
This isn't a good example because I would explicitly have millions if I had put it all into BTC in september 2020 when it was around 9k, taken profits at 45k a year later in december under the assumption that december was the top just following the 2017 chart. And then followed the 2017 chart again by buying in november 2018 at 20k with all I had, which would then easily have amounted to over a million in december 2025- and this is assuming I am retarded and strictly follow the 2017 bottoms and tops as a model, not even attempting to sell high and buy low.

62062579
>>62062406
if people werent retarded spenders they would have money saved
>>62062482
no they will just ask the bank to borrow even more money

62062604
>>62062482
I don't think it's true because they must have money in their 401k. I think it's mostly just a statement on how little people keep LIQUID, not in total. If you fuck yourself up and need cash obviously you have tosell investments and things to cover it.

62062610
>>62062348
Top 24% means nothing to me.
Most people have shit lives, beating that isn’t an achievement

62062619
>>62062044
Wait until you get to 7 figure purgatory. Too much money to not want to work but too little to live life

62062754
>>62062044
I fell out of 6 figures hell a few months ago and now I just want to get back

62062764
>>62062610
True. I want to live at a 5-star resort and have fun every day.

62062843
I’m making 4 figs.
t. NEET

62062848
>>62062619
Yeah.
Moral of the story.
Dont have kids if your kids are going to be struggling poor or working class.

62062993
>>62062044
>folio hit 6 figures again today.
only 10x (not adjusted for inflation) and my real life can begin.

62063154
>>62062044
I've been in 7 figure purgatory for 5 years. The humiliation doesn't stop here.

62063163
>>62062320
Wtf really? That can't be right. I'm at like $1.4m total nw and I'm only 35. Surely most boomers with paid off houses and retirement accounts are over $1m.

62063293
>>62063163
im in a similar position. apparently thats top 5% nw for mid-30s. doesn't feel like it.

62063412
I have been stuck at 400-470k for the past 3 years since I lost my online income. Im a NEET now.
I had a peak at 670k with MSTR but took a screenshot instead of gains. And im also bagholding 2 stocks (BTBT and IREN). Now im considering sweet cide.

62063597
>>62062341
You're a nigger

62064061
>>62063163
houses don't really count...if you live in a desirable area, no hoa, low tax state, and check all the boxes so to speak, you can use like 50-70% of the "zestimate" as the worth value for a building of equivalent sqft. It's a little harsh when they say dont use home value at all, but if it's paid off you at a minimum have the land value minus demolition and selling costs. On the other hand, most people are completely delusional about "improvements" they've made to a house.

62064218
Gambling :)

62064226
>>62062044
No joke. You need to start your own business to get to the next class

62064300
>>62064082
Get a job nigger

62064368
>>62064334
> I have a job but I don't have enough money to invest
> but I don't have enough money to invest
This is literally like 95% of people. And even when they do “invest” it is nothing and in the long run, also nothing. Your situation isn’t special at all.

62064498
>>62064377
bump

62064629
>>62064377
Why would we do that? You’re begging and shitting up a board/thread.

62064678
>>62064377
Why couldn’t your parents help you?

62064808
>>62064082
Fuck off we're full. Stay in your third world shithole please.
